name: Korpus
summary: Go service that owns the canonical write path. Validates events against JSON Schemas, persists to Postgres, handles FK-aware retries.
signal: Single write boundary with explicit contracts.

name: Pularis
summary: Stateless Go polling adapter. Config-driven HTTP fetcher that transforms API responses into Redis events. No persistence inside.
signal: Fetch, transform, emit. Stateless by design.

name: Kor
summary: Minimal Go TCP message router for Anima. Services register handlers, publish events, and make request/response calls through a compact framed protocol.

name: Futura
summary: Diploma project. My scope was the ML pipeline: Python/Jupyter with TA-Lib indicators, RFE feature selection, LightGBM classifier for next-day stock trends, MongoDB writeback.
signal: ML workflow execution, not a trading system claim.
